data.name: Memory Puzzle - Mile High Fun
data.detailed_description:
Train your brain with this memory game, revealing the naughty sexual adventures of a Futanari flight attendant and her 2 passengers on a private jet, in images hidden behind pairs of cards which you have to match.
Flip two cards, and if the numbers on them match, they will be removed from the board, gradually revealing a unique image.

Features:
  • Increased difficulty. Match both numbers and airport codes.
  • 12 different adult images to reveal at high resolution
  • Cards are shuffled randomly at each game, for maximum replay value.
  • Timer, to see how long it takes to solve a puzzle
  • Gallery where you can view all the puzzle images you have solved.
  • Relaxing music.

Be among the fastest players to achieve a top spot in our Leaderboards and unlock various achievements.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
